title: Jeikir's Glass Doors
description: This resource pack adds glass to doors and trapdoors!
body:
- https://linktr.ee/jeikir -
 

Tired of default vanilla minecraft doors?..

 

Try the Jeikir's Glass Doors Resource pack!

 

This resource pack adds glass to doors and trapdoors!

 

===|

You can use this resource pack for your videos, but you must provide a link to the mod's page.
